headline: Newsweek Names Integrity One of America's Greatest Workplaces for Culture, Belonging & Community
summary: Integrity, LLC ("Integrity"), a leading distributor of life and health insurance, and provider of wealth management and retirement planning solutions, today announced it has been recognized by Newsweek as one of America's Greatest Workplaces for Culture, Belonging & Community. This prestigious award honors the company's emphasis on creating an environment where employees feel valued, heard and connected. Other winners include American Express, Google, GE, Starbucks, 3M, Accenture and Adobe.

headline: Accenture and WaveMaker Announce Strategic Intent to Help Growth-Focused Organizations Scale with Agentic AI Platform
summary: Companies to leverage hybrid agentic AI platform with industry-first 2-pass code generation architecture and built-in guardrails for enterprise-grade outcomesNEW YORK and DALLAS, April 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Accenture (NYSE: ACN) and WaveMaker, a leading agentic platform provider for enterprise-grade application generation, today announced strategic intent to help organizations – particularly those pursuing high growth with annual revenue of up to US$3 billion – modernize applications fast
